title: Get wall-clock time at session start
description: Made a 'today is Monday' assumption that was three days stale. Wrote a status update referring to events as 'tomorrow' that were already in the past.
context: Long sessions, sessions resumed from compaction, or any work that mentions dates relative to 'now'.
resolution: Re-checked the date and edited the message.
prevention: First action in any session that touches dates, deadlines, or schedules: run the current-time tool (or `date`) and treat THAT as the source of truth. Never trust 'today' inferred from conversation context.
trigger: About to mention 'today', 'yesterday', 'tomorrow', or a deadline
